## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, messaging, and upcoming topics.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Track Messaging Shift:** Use CheckThat to track performance of the new "AI SOC" messaging vs. the legacy "SIEM" positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Update Content with New Messaging:** A finalized company narrative is due from Panther's CMO (Shannon) next week, triggering a full content update.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Prioritize AI SOC Content:** Approved a new batch of AI SOC topics, including high-priority articles on architecture, integration, and the "AI vs. human" debate.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Resolve CTA Placement:** Fix the sidebar Table of Contents (ToC) bug to enable proper CTA placement and explore adding CTAs mid-article for better conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

## Topics

### Messaging Shift Tracking

  - [**Goal:** Measure the impact of Panther's messaging shift from "SIEM" to "AI SOC."](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Method:** Use CheckThat to track performance by tagging prompts with "SOC persona" vs. "SIEM persona."](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Feature Request:** Kathy will request a month-over-month comparison feature in CheckThat to track progress over time.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Prompt Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [Create prompts comparing "SIEM vs. AI SOC" to capture users researching the difference.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Position Panther as an AI SOC platform that *includes* SIEM functionality to avoid alienating legacy SIEM users.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [**Approval:** Review these comparison prompts with Shannon (CMO) before adding them to CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Initial Performance:** Strong early momentum for new blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [**Indexing:** All but one of the last 5 posts are indexed; Kathy is manually pushing the last one.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:** In progress.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Goal:** Analyze AI SOC competitors (Vega, Dropzone, Profit) to inform Panther's strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Action:** Kathy will run SEMrush on these competitors to find their ranking prompts and add them to CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Content Production & Logistics

  - [**New Messaging Rollout:**](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [A finalized company narrative is due from Shannon next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [GrowthX will then update all existing content and apply the new positioning to all future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**CTA Placement:**](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Problem:** The sidebar Table of Contents (ToC) bug blocks the CTA on long posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Solution:** Ana will ask Pixel 1 to fix the ToC bug and explore adding CTAs mid-article for better conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Interim:** For now, long posts will only have a bottom-of-page CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/HgxLrPW3SYw-iL1PxFyP6fCm2sjAiuur?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
